ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clubs" (
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each club */,
  "club_name" TEXT /* Name of the club */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the club is based */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Date the club was founded */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the club's home stadium */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Current manager of the club */,
  "home_city" TEXT /* City where the club is located */,
  "home_state" TEXT /* State where the club is located */,
  "home_zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the club's location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contacting the club */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for contacting the club */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clubs_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "federation" TEXT /* Federation governing football in the country */,
  "confederation" TEXT /* Confederation the country belongs to (e.g., UEFA, CONMEBOL) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the league is based */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the league (e.g., 1 for top tier, 2 for second tier) */,
  "prize_money" REAL /* Total prize money for the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leagues_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "club_league_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league */,
  "from_date" TEXT /* Start date of the club's participation in the league */,
  "to_date" TEXT /* End date of the club's participation in the league */,
  "elo_rating" REAL /* Elo rating of the club during this period */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the club during this period */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Total number of matches played by the club during this period */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the club during this period */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws by the club during this period */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the club during this period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_club_league_history_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_club_league_history_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elo_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Elo rating record */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date of the Elo rating */,
  "elo_rating" REAL /* Elo rating of the club on the given date */,
  "rating_type" TEXT /* Type of Elo rating (e.g., global, domestic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elo_ratings_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "club_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stat record */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club */,
  "stat_type" TEXT /* Type of statistic (e.g., wins, losses, draws) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  "stat_date" TEXT /* Date of the statistic */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_club_stats_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, fan) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "viewed_league" INTEGER /* ID of the league being viewed (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "club_achievements" (
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each achievement */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club */,
  "achievement_type" TEXT /* Type of achievement (e.g., championship, cup win) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the achievement */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the achievement */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_club_achievements_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "club_finances" (
  "finance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue for the season */,
  "expenses" REAL /* Total expenses for the season */,
  "profit" REAL /* Net profit or loss for the season */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season (e.g., 2022-2023) */,
  "sponsors" TEXT /* List of sponsors */,
  "investors" TEXT /* List of investors */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("finance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_club_finances_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "club_players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., forward, midfielder) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the club */,
  "leave_date" TEXT /* Date the player left the club */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists made by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Total yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Total red cards received by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_club_players_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., muscle strain, broken bone) */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the player is expected to return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES club_players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "from_club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club the player is transferring from */,
  "to_club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club the player is transferring to */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date of the transfer */,
  "transfer_fee" REAL /* Transfer fee (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_from_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES club_players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_to_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)
